stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P03 A1 省级与重点城市 cohort

value.user_value: An A1 coverage/quality/cost scorecard with reversible promote/hold/disable decisions over all 22 A1 sources touched by T050 (provinces) and T051 (cities): 3 promoted (real backfilled docs), 18 held (verified A1 but original fetch pending), 1 disabled (blocked). 100% official identity; promotion is earned on real document evidence, not value.
value.why_it_matters: Deciding which A1 sources enter continuous production must be evidence-based and reversible -- promote only on demonstrated quality/timeliness, hold what is unverified, disable what is broken; never promote for coverage optics.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a scorecard/decision task over cached evidence -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (scorecard + reversible decisions; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
